subcodes.first_line: O divine friends and heavenly companions! Though years may roll on and days come to an end, and the fabric of this earthly life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی و دوستان ربانی سالها بگذرد و ایام بسر اید و بساط این حیات
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
